mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dict_type (dict_name, dict_type, status, create_by, create_time, deleted, remark) VALUES (#{dictName}, #{dictType}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, 0, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_dict_type
dict_name = #{dictName}, dict_type = #{dictType}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dict_type SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_dict_type WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_dict_type WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_dict_type WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_dict_type WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dict_type WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dict_type WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND deleted = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_dict_type WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND deleted = 1
